query: Can you assist in developing a 3-day trip plan for two individuals? We'll embark on our journey from San Jose aiming to explore Portland from March 16th to March 18th, 2022. Our budget is limited to $1,000. Our itinerary must include accommodations where pets are allowed. Regarding cuisine, we're particularly interested in Mediterranean, French, Mexican, and Indian food. Importantly, please avoid any flight bookings for transportation.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from San Jose to Portland, duration: 10 hours 14 mins, distance: 1,073 km, cost: 53
plan.dinner: Barbeque Nation, Portland;The Coffee Bean & Tea Leaf, Portland;

plan.lunch: Rahul Eggs, Portland;Jeet Chaat Bhandar, Portland;
plan.dinner: Mighty Mughlai, Portland;Samavar - The Ashok, Portland;

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Portland to San Jose, duration: 10 hours 20 mins, distance: 1,074 km, cost: 53
plan.lunch: Nacho Mamas Burritos, Portland;Cactus Flower Cafe Navarre, Portland;
plan.dinner: The Kitchen Factory, Portland;True 2BR Duplex, Portland;
